case_title: COORITALIA, INC. VS. NEW MARBLE CO, INC.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY COORITALIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COORITALIA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00, PLAINTIFF MET THE BURDEN OF PROOF RE INCORRECT SIZING OF THE TILES BUT DID NOT MEET ITS BURDEN OF PROOF RE DEFENDANT'S RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE SCRATCHED TILES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COORITALIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-21-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY COORITALIA, INC. NEW MARBLE CO, INC.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF COORITALIA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF COORITALIA INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALESSIO DE FRANCESCA, CEO. DEFENDANT NEW MARBLE CO. INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALANLUCA BLESLO VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPUALTED TO JUDGE PROTEM HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF COORITALIA, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.
